from the emergency supply) 
18 = LTC patient admit/readmission indicator. This status required new dispensing of medication. 
19 = Split billing. The quantity dispensed is the remainder billed to a subsequent payer after Medicare 
Part A benefits expired (partial payment under Part A). 
21 = LTC dispensing rule for <=14-day supply is not applicable due to CMS exclusion or the fact that the 
manufacturer’s packaging does not allow for special dispensing 
22 = LTC dispensing, 7-day supply
